name: Hyatt Place

red_flags.summary: No Item 19 financial performance representation disclosed.

validation_questions: Confirm current auditor and most recent audit opinion.

internal_unresolveds.reason: Territory protection expires 3 years after opening. After that, zero encroachment protection for an $18M-$52M investment.
Successor franchise terms explicitly may be 'materially different' including fees. No cap on how different.
System Standards (3,614 pages) can be modified unilaterally. No limit on frequency or cost of required Technology System upgrades.
$110M goodwill impairment in 2024 on management/franchising reporting unit. Signals potential concerns about segment value.
$1,245M real estate gains inflate 2024 net income. Stripping gains and impairments, underlying operating income is substantially lower.
System Services Cost allocation methodology at franchisor discretion. No independent audit required.
F&B Operations Plan requires franchisor approval, including restaurant concepts and F&B operators.
Competing Brand Owner definition is broad (4+ hotels, 60% of Brand Hotel ADR), potentially limiting management company choices.
Item 18 and Item 19 share the same TOC page number (77). In the PDF, Item 18 is a single sentence followed immediately by Item 19 on the same page. Not material.

Loyalty program economics: Item 8 states franchisees received $68.88M net benefit from WOH, but Item 6 shows 4% assessment is significant ongoing cost. Net benefit likely varies dramatically by hotel.
